entry.title: Eightfold Pleasure
entry.summary:
Author: YouKnowWhatElseIsBig_MyFeet

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,276Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 128

Summary: Jisung is 100% sure he's gay.The only problem? He's a virgin whose entire sexual education has come from watching one faceless camboy with heavenly abs and a voice that makes him feel things he's only ever read about. Then he meets him. The sex is mind-breaking. He's addicted to the dominance, to Minho, to this new person he's becoming. After round two in Minho's bed, fucked-out and blissful, he thinks he's finally got it all figured out. Until he meets Chan the next morning. In Minho's kitchen. A hot stranger who looks at him like he's already been claimed. A hot stranger who touches him, and his dick betrays him instantly. A hot stranger who makes it terrifyingly clear that Minho's bed might not be the only one he'll be warming. Jisung thought his world was complicated before. He had no idea.

entry.title: Love Our Way
entry.summary:
Author: Dimplesgirl2004

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,770Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 10

Summary: Part two of Fate will intervene. Amelia and Minho have finally settled into their relationship after their rocky start. Soon they realize their relationship may not look like a typical relationship, especially when it comes to Chan and Jisung. All four of them must navigate this new dynamic and deal with all the feelings that come to the surface. Some handle that better than others.

entry.summary:
Author: MinAreum3

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 60,704Chapters: 8/9Kudos: 155

Summary: Minho and Han were happy. Happy with how beautiful Jisung sounded when he begged Minho to let him come, how good Minho's dick felt, especially when he fucked the anxiety out of him, you get it.One subdrop, a few panic attacks and lots of due conversations later, Chan's in for a ride he didn't even remember getting on. entry.title: The Leader's Pretty Stress Reliever
entry.summary:
Author: wttzard

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,505Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 36

Summary: The deadlines were a predatory pack of wolves and he was running out of ground. Chan reached for his phone, the screen’s glare making him wince. He didn’t hesitate. He knew exactly what he needed to stop the spiraling in his brain. He dialed a number he knew by heart."Hyunjin. Get to the studio. Now." Chan said, his voice a low, jagged friction."Chan? It’s late. Is everything okay?" Hyunjin’s voice was soft, slightly breathless even over the phone."I didn't ask what time it was. I told you to get here. Wear that oversized hoodie and nothing else beneath it. Move."

entry.title: My Guardian Angel
entry.summary:
Author: Yoncewcew

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,999Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 9

Summary: Jisung is broken. He was broken by the hands of people who knew how to use them. He's escaped a toxic home, and a recent awful relationship, but he never truely healed. He spends everyday not knowing when things will get better, diving back into the relapse of self doubt. He's taunted with reminders, of people and events, when he finds someone. His "guardian angel", presented in the figure of a man. He grows everyday opening up. He's safe, he's loved. But it doesn't feel right. - Sorry this is kind of a pissy summary, I promise the actual story is good I just don't want to spoil it too much.WARNING/MINOR SPOILER!! This involves some mature content, read at your own risk, and I'm sorry but Bangchan is kind of the bad guy in this, and I'm not trying to depict him in a bad way at all, so please do not take this the wrong way. Also this is a fictional story, I'm not trying to ship any of the members in a religious way and this is all just my mind and a story I have come up with, not based on any personal or real life events. Also maybe a cheeky little plot tiwst.

entry.title: under the blankets
entry.summary:
Author: hartleyshole

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,901Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 73

Summary: his skin itches from how light the wandering fingers are, pressing ever so slightly into the sensitive skin at his inner thigh. “daddy?” “hmm? what is it, babyboy?” chan’s head leans on his neck. “you want your milk?” “wha’s daddy’s hand doin’?” chan shushes him immediately, looking over to his friends. they seem engrossed in the TV. “sorry…” “it’s alright, sweetheart. you’re always allowed to ask daddy questions.” the hand on his tummy moves off, lifting up his big t-shirt and patting the bare skin underneath. “just be a good boy, okay? let daddy touch.” changbin nods. “hmm, thank you, pretty boy.”or, changbin has an eye opening experience and wants to try something new, so chan plays with him under the blankets during a movie night.

entry.summary:
Author: actuallyacar

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,693Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 72

entry.title: Glass Wings
entry.summary:
Author: TheDaisyRoots

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 48,709Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 761

Summary: A rag-tag group of gold-hearted criminals, the Stray Kids Gang is dominant heavy and in desperate need of a submissive to balance out their eros. Luckily, the latest stray brought in by their leader is the adorable touch starved sub, Lee Felix.When Felix bumps into dom Chan after months of self-neglect to his needs, instinct sends him to his knees — literally. With his health on the line, Felix reluctantly agrees to stay with the eros until he can recover, but quickly becomes attached to everyone — everyone except intimidating dom Hyunjin, who grows increasingly agitated by Felix’s attitude. Can Felix swallow his pride long enough to allow Hyunjin to care for him, too?•~• ʚïɞ •~•OR; Traumatized sub Felix learns how to accept himself through the love of his new eros — after Hyunjin tames the brat out of him.OT8, with main emphasis on Hyunlix and Chanlix.

entry.title: Overlap
entry.summary:
Author: odysseyofmemory

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 86,162Chapters: 25/26Kudos: 224

Summary: He smiles at her, one thousand Chans reflected one thousand times in the mirrored elevator walls. One thousand parallel universes where she could be in an elevator with Chan in Rome late at night, with his loverboy eyes, and how many of those universes are different? How many of those Chans have loverboy eyes? How many versions of her give in to them? How many good things actually happen to those versions after 2AM? or Everyone knows idols shouldn't date their staff. Chan's not sure if he cares anymore.
